name: Mercedes-Benz E-Class W210/S210 (5.4L V8 supercharged AMG)

serviceNotes.engine oil: M113 5.4L Kompressor AMG: shorter oil intervals (commonly 10,000 km / 12 months; hard use ~8,000 km).
serviceNotes.spark plugs: M113 Kompressor AMG: 45,000 km / 36 months per AMG maintenance table.
serviceNotes.coolant: Long-life coolant 160,000 km or 5 years, whichever first.
serviceNotes.poly-V belt: Supercharger drive ~80,000 km inspection; accessory belt per condition.

serviceSources.engine oil: Mercedes-AMG E 55 (W210) owner's manual EU / AMG maintenance supplement — shortened Oil Service 10,000 km / 12 months (M113 Kompressor); cross-check https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v7672-2002/service (no interval table on site)
serviceSources.dust filter: Mercedes-Benz E-Class (W210/S210) owner's manual EU — dust/pollen filter 30,000 km / 24 months
serviceSources.engine air filter: Mercedes-AMG E 55 (W210) owner's manual EU — supercharged V8 air filter per Inspection / ASSYST (60,000 km / 48 months orientation in file)
serviceSources.brake fluid: Mercedes-Benz / AMG E-Class (W210) owner's manual EU — brake fluid renewal every 2 years (DOT 4+)
serviceSources.check brake pad thickness: Mercedes-AMG E 55 (W210) maintenance supplement — high-performance brake inspection ~20,000 km orientation
serviceSources.spark plugs: Mercedes-AMG E 55 (W210) owner's manual EU — M113 Kompressor spark plugs 45,000 km / 36 months
serviceSources.coolant: Mercedes-Benz E-Class (W210) owner's manual EU — long-life coolant 160,000 km / 60 months (5 years), whichever first
serviceSources.automatic transmission fluid: 722.6 preventive ATF ~60,000 km — Mercedes-Benz workshop / specialist consensus
serviceSources.rear axle differential oil: LSD rear axle oil preventive ~60,000 km — specialist consensus (E 55)
serviceSources.coolant flush: Supplementary coolant exchange ~100,000 km — AMG / severe-use orientation in file
serviceSources.poly-V belt: Supercharger / accessory belt ~80,000 km — Mercedes-AMG W210 specialist consensus
